articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: International gold, silver prices continue to drop as dollar strengthens
articles.summary: Gold loans have become an increasingly significant component of retail lending over the past four years, with their share in retail loan portfolios more than doubling during the period. At the same time, finance companies have emerged as the fastest-growing category of lenders, steadily expanding their presence and capturing a larger share of the market, according to a report released by credit bureau Experian.

articles.title: "Taking breaks is also important": CUET UG 2026 topper Devina Gahlot, daughter of BJP leader Kailash Gahlot, shares her success formula
articles.summary: Devina Gahlot, daughter of BJP leader Kailash Gahlot, secured All India Rank 1 in CUET UG 2026 after the results were announced on June 23. In an interaction with ANI, she credited conceptual understanding over rote learning, stressed the importance of taking breaks during preparation, and said CUET largely tests NCERT-based knowledge through application-oriented questions..

articles.title: ICAI CA Intermediate May 2026 results to be out today: Check steps to download scorecards
articles.summary: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) is expected to announce the CA Intermediate May 2026 examination results by the evening of June 24. Candidates who appeared for the exams held from May 5 to May 15 can access their scorecards online using their roll and registration numbers.

articles.title: 'People actually stop working': Indian woman shares the European habit she wishes India had
articles.summary: An Indian expat in Germany, Himani Sharma, shares a profound cultural shift: Europe's ability to truly switch off after work. Unlike India, where work often intrudes on personal time, European evenings see shops close and people dedicate themselves to life beyond the office.
